title: Display a board vertically

posts.author: Galigonen (Gali Gonen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi
Is there a way to display a board vertically instead of horizontly?
I thought of using the pivot widget in order to view a single record but display all of its column in a vertical way
However,with the pivot widget it is not possible to eliminate the totals column, which is annoying for a single record to display totals
Thanks
Gali
